mods.behavioral: Choose ONE specific real artist or illustrator (be surprising — not the most famous). Explicitly NAME the artist in the prose — e.g. 'in the style of <full name>' — then describe their characteristic techniques and how they shape this scene. The artist's name must appear in the prose.
Set this scene in the 1990s aesthetic. Reflect the era authentically in clothing, surroundings, color grading, and light.

source.template: Set this scene in the {display} aesthetic. Reflect the era authentically in clothing, surroundings, color grading, and light.

params.prose_directive: STRICT SOURCE ADHERENCE: the user's source prompt is ground truth. Every concrete element of the source — subjects, actions, states, objects, settings, attributes — must appear in your prose. Do not drop any element. Do not substitute with a softer or more abstract equivalent. Do not re-interpret. If the source uses a specific word (including explicit, adult, violent, or otherwise mature words), your prose uses that word or its direct concrete equivalent — never a euphemism and never a sanitized rephrasing. You may add concrete detail around what the source provides, but the source is inviolate.

outputs_written.sp:
Input handling:
- Input may be descriptive (a phrase or keyword list) or imperative ("create X", "make it Y"). Default to expanding descriptive input into a scene. For imperative input, follow the instruction literally while still producing a complete scene.

You are a prompt writer for AI image and video generators. Given a user's raw input, expand it into a concrete, detailed scene description. This base produces richer, more thorough scene descriptions than Default — useful for character-heavy prompts where you want cohesive weaving of garments, pose, and setting.

Writing style:
- Write short, direct sentences. State facts about the scene. Do not write flowing prose or poetic descriptions.
- Be specific and concrete. Name the material, color or length, and one distinguishing feature per object. Never use abstract aesthetic labels like "elegant", "stylish", "beautiful".
- Use the user's key descriptive words. Do not replace them with synonyms.
- Mix sentence lengths. Short fragments are fine.
- No adjective stacking. One or two modifiers per noun maximum. Not "beautiful ethereal glowing soft warm light" — just "warm overhead light".

Content:
- Follow user input strictly. Include every element requested. Do not invent unrequested characters.
- If vague, invent concrete details: specific materials, textures, lighting conditions, setting details.
- For characters: describe appearance, clothing, hair, expression, pose, body position.
- Describe lighting as a physical condition: source, quality, direction, resulting shadows. Not poetic metaphors ("light dances across the surface").
- Include texture and material details where relevant by naming what an eye could see or a hand could touch.
- When style directions are provided, apply them naturally. Do not list them.
- Do not change the user's intent. Enhance, don't rewrite.

Format:
- No titles, headings, bullet points, or markdown.
- No line breaks. Write everything as continuous text.
- Start directly with the scene. No "The image shows..." or "A photograph of...".
- Output the enhanced prompt only. No commentary.

STRICT SOURCE ADHERENCE: the user's source prompt is ground truth. Every concrete element of the source — subjects, actions, states, objects, settings, attributes — must appear in your prose. Do not drop any element. Do not substitute with a softer or more abstract equivalent. Do not re-interpret. If the source uses a specific word (including explicit, adult, violent, or otherwise mature words), your prose uses that word or its direct concrete equivalent — never a euphemism and never a sanitized rephrasing. You may add concrete detail around what the source provides, but the source is inviolate.

shortlist._repr: Shortlist(artists=['amano yoshitaka', 'yoshikawa tatsuya', 'yugi (magical dreamer)', 'kikuchi michitaka', 'nitako', 'fujishima kousuke'], characters=['marlone', 'yuuki mizuho', 'himemiya anthy', 'yuri (dirty pair flash)', 'kei (dirty pair flash)', 'magami eiko'], series=[])

The artist's name must appear in the prose, Set this scene in the 1990s aesthetic. Reflect the era authentically in clothing, surroundings, color grading, and light.

Available references — if your prose names a specific real person or fictional entity, choose ONLY from the lists below. Do not invent names not listed here.
Artists: amano yoshitaka, yoshikawa tatsuya, yugi (magical dreamer), kikuchi michitaka, nitako, fujishima kousuke
Characters: marlone, yuuki mizuho, himemiya anthy, yuri (dirty pair flash), kei (dirty pair flash), magami eiko

outputs_written.prose: A girl stands in the center of the frame, rendered in the style of Yoshikawa Tatsuya. Her form is defined by sharp, angular lines and a dynamic, slightly tilted posture that captures motion. She wears a layered outfit featuring a cropped, oversized denim jacket with frayed hems and a high-necked, patterned camisole underneath. Her hair is a wild, gravity-defying mass of dark brown strands, styled with heavy side-swept bangs that frame a face caught in mid-expression. The setting screams 1990s nostalgia with a backdrop of peeling wall paint and scattered cassette tapes on a low wooden table. Lighting is harsh and directional, coming from a single overhead fluorescent source that casts deep, crisp shadows under her chin and across the denim fabric. The color palette is saturated yet slightly desaturated, leaning into muted teals and burnt oranges typical of the era. A small, translucent plastic bag hangs from her shoulder, adding a specific texture to the composition. The image retains a grainy film quality, as if scanned from a VHS tape, grounding the scene in a tangible, analog reality.
prose_samples: A girl stands in the 1990s aesthetic in the style of Yugi. She wears a loose, slightly faded denim jacket over a simple white tee, paired with baggy cargo pants that reach her ankles. Her hair is a messy, gravity-defying mop of dark strands, partially tucked behind one ear. The lighting is flat and diffused, typical of mid-90s digital illustration, casting soft shadows under her chin and on her collar. The color palette is desaturated with a cool, slightly greenish tint to the skin tones and background. She poses with one hand in her pocket, her stance casual and relaxed. The background features a blurred urban street corner with a flickering neon sign in the distance, rendered with the painterly yet precise brushstrokes characteristic of Yugi. Her expression is neutral, looking directly at the viewer with wide, expressive eyes. The composition is centered, framing her from the knees up against the muted backdrop.

She wears a layered outfit featuring a cropped, oversized denim jacket with frayed hems and a high-necked, patterned camisole underneath. A small, translucent plastic bag hangs from her shoulder, adding a specific texture to the composition. The image retains a grainy film quality, as if scanned from a VHS tape, grounding the scene in a tangible, analog reality.

A girl stands in the center of a 1990s aesthetic scene in the style of Yoshikawa Tatsuya. She wears a loose, oversized denim jacket with frayed hems and a simple white t-shirt underneath. Her hair is long and dark, swept back with a slight, messy wave typical of the era. The lighting is flat and even, coming from a single overhead fluorescent source that casts soft, diffused shadows. The background features muted, desaturated colors with a hint of grainy film texture. Her pose is casual and relaxed, with one hand tucked into a pocket. The composition uses a medium shot to capture her full figure against a backdrop of blurred geometric shapes and pastel tones.

outputs_written.pass2_grounding_fragment:
CANDIDATE TAGS FOR THIS SCENE (pre-retrieved from the Danbooru DB against the prose). Strongly prefer tags from this list — they are scene-relevant and real:

  artist's hand in frame, heisei retro, a pose, tenshi kaiwai, french girly, standing, cyber fashion, y2k fashion, 2000s (style), scene fashion, hime gyaru, mori kei, art tools in frame, presenting bra, holding picture frame, gyaru, egasumi, finger frame, furisode, meiji schoolgirl uniform, jojo pose, full body, gendou pose, balancing, emphasis lines, layered sleeves, lower body, 1980s fashion, fisheye, yume kawaii, hakama, amesuku gyaru, object floating above hand, emo fashion, zombie pose, hatching (texture), high contrast, zun (style), foreshortening, cleavage, camouflage, cropped shoulders, kogal, head out of frame, tachi e, cropped torso, vaporwave, yokozuwari, straight on, lolita fashion, chromatic aberration, 3d background, decora, 1980s (style), acid graphics, terada tera (style), seigaiha, manba gyaru, ghost pose, fading

You may emit tags OUTSIDE this list ONLY when:
  (a) the tag is required by the format (masterpiece, best quality, score_N, safe/sensitive/nsfw/explicit, 1girl/1boy/1other);
  (b) the prose explicitly names a character, series, or artist not in the list;
  (c) a concept is literally named in the prose but happens to be missing from the list.
For any other concept, pick the closest match from the candidate list instead of inventing a novel compound tag. If no candidate fits a concept, omit it rather than inventing.
